title: Times and dates for spring 2026 commencement
summary_en: This spring, more than 6,100 University of Iowa students will receive their degrees during commencement ceremonies, beginning with the College of Pharmacy’s Doctor of Pharmacy ceremony on May 14 and concluding with the College of Dentistry ceremony on June 5.
summary_cn: 为规范做好2026年春季学期毕业组织工作，保障毕业典礼平稳有序举办，各级教育主管部门及各普通高等院校近期公布2026年春季毕业典礼相关时间安排，明确有关工作要求。

title: Iowa alumni win 2026 Pulitzer Prizes for memoir, fiction
summary_en: Two University of Iowa alumni have won 2026 Pulitzer Prizes, and two more were named finalists — with Yiyun Li and Daniel Kraus joining a distinguished list of more than 40 Iowa-affiliated Pulitzer winners.
title_cn: 艾奥瓦大学校友分获2026年普利策奖回忆录、小说类奖项
summary_cn: 近期，2026年普利策奖评选结果正式公布，美国艾奥瓦大学两名校友分别获得回忆录类、小说类奖项。本次获奖是该校文学创作领域人才培养成效的集中体现，受到教育界广泛关注。
